recalls.Description: Synergy Housewares is recalling Wolfgang Puck-branded petite tea kettles featuring a removable tea infuser basket. These stainless-steel kettles, with a capacity of 14 oz., were available in beige, black, pink, and red. Each kettle is marked with 'Wolfgang Puck Petite Kettle' and a six-digit lot code located on the underside (022020, 022021, 022022, 042022, 022023, or 032023).
recalls.Title: Recall of Wolfgang Puck Petite Tea Kettles by Synergy Housewares Due to Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Synergy Housewares at 855-837-4111, available Monday to Friday from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, or visit their website at https://claims.synergyhousewares.com/recall.

Images.Caption: Wolfgang Puck Petite Kettle appears on the kettle's underside

Injuries.Name: Synergy Housewares has received at least 10 reports of incidents involving the kettle lids, including 5 resulting in injuries such as burns or scalding from the lid falling off the kettle during use.

Retailers.Name: Available on HSN.com and through the HSN television network from August 2020 to January 2025 for approximately $20.

Importers.Name: Synergy Housewares LLC, of Coconut Creek, Florida

Hazards.Name: Loose infuser basket lid can detach during use, creating a burn hazard.

Remedies.Name: Stop using the kettle and contact Synergy Housewares for a complimentary replacement lid.

recalls.metaDescription: Synergy Housewares recalls Wolfgang Puck petite tea kettles due to a burn hazard. Contact for a free replacement lid.

recalls.Description: Sensio is recalling the Bella Pro Series Steam Espresso Maker (Model 90195) and Cooks Steam Espresso Maker (Model 22395) due to safety concerns. These espresso machines, featuring a black design with stainless steel accents, measure approximately six inches in width and twelve inches in height. The model identifiers can be found on a sticker located underneath the machine, labeled as the 'Item' number.
recalls.Title: Sensio Recalls Bella Pro Series and Cooks Steam Espresso Machines Due to Burn and Laceration Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach Sensio toll-free at 855-647-3125 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit www.bellakitchenware.com and select 'Recalls' for additional details.

Products.Name: Bella Pro Series Steam Espresso Maker

Images.Caption: Recalled Bella Pro Series Espresso machine

Injuries.Name: The firm has received 18 reports of the handles ejecting, eight of which reported burn and/or laceration injuries.

Retailers.Name: Available at JCPenney stores across the country and online at BestBuy.com and JCPenney.com from August 2023 to January 2025, priced between $40 and $60.

Hazards.Name: Risk of glass carafe shattering and causing burns or lacerations due to ejection of the brew cup handle.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to cease using the recalled machines and contact Sensio for a refund.

recalls.metaDescription: Sensio recalls Bella Pro Series and Cooks Steam Espresso Machines due to burn and laceration hazards. Learn how to get a refund.

recalls.Description: ALDI has announced a recall of the Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker due to a risk of burns. These coffee makers, available in gray, blue, pink, and purple, measure approximately 11 inches in length, 4.7 inches in width, and 12 inches in height. The Ambiano brand name is displayed on the side of the unit. Model numbers and UPC codes can be found on the rating label located on the bottom of the coffee maker.
recalls.Title: ALDI Issues Recall for Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers Due to Potential Burn Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can contact ALDI at 888-770-7124, available from 8:30 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. More information can also be found online at www.recallrtr.com/aldicoffeemaker or corporate.aldi.us under the 'Newsroom' section and then 'Product Recalls.'

Images.Caption: Recalled Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker (Blue)
Recalled Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker (Gray)
Recalled Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker (Pink)
Recalled Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Maker (Purple)

Injuries.Name: ALDI has received 25 reports of the recalled coffeemakers expelling hot water from the top of the machine, including three reports of burns.

Retailers.Name: ALDI grocery stores across 38 states and the District of Columbia, sold from July 2023 to September 2023 for approximately $50.

Hazards.Name: Risk of burn due to hot water expulsion from the machine

Remedies.Name: Consumers should cease using the coffee makers immediately. They can return the product to any ALDI store for a full refund of $49.99 plus tax, or opt for a $75 ALDI electronic gift card by registering the recalled coffee maker at www.recallrtr.com/aldicoffeemaker. Instructions will be provided for cutting the unplugged cord, disposing of the unit, and submitting photos showing the model number, registration number, and cut cord.

recalls.metaDescription: ALDI recalls Ambiano Single Serve Coffee Makers due to burn hazards. Stop using immediately and follow instructions for refunds or gift cards.
